Market Trading Guide: Buy Tata Consumer and Welspun Corp on Tuesday for gains up to 14%
india_trends.summary: Nifty extended losses for a third straight session amid heavy selling in banking, auto and energy stocks. Analysts warned of a bearish trend after technical breakdowns below key moving averages, while recommending Tata Consumer and Welspun Corp as bullish positional trading opportunities

india_trends.title: India declines Russian LNG under sanctions, talks continue on permitted cargoes, sources say
india_trends.summary: India has refused Russian liquefied natural gas shipments under United States sanctions. This decision comes amid energy supply concerns due to Middle East tensions. india_trends.title: JP Morgan sees Brent staying in low $100s even if Hormuz reopens in June
india_trends.summary: JP Morgan's revised framework assumes that ‌the pace ⁠of ⁠oil inventory depletion will ultimately force the Strait to reopen "one way or another," ​with the bank's base case anchored on a June 1 reopening following a ​credible announcement confirmed by both sides.

india_trends.title: Unfazed by NSE’s commodity push, market share remains intact: MCX chief
india_trends.summary: MCX chief executive Praveena Rai says the bourse continues to dominate the commodity derivatives ecosystem since she took over, despite the competition launching new contracts and revising expiry schedules to gain traction.

india_trends.title: Markets tumble after Modi urges curbs on fuel use, gold buying
india_trends.summary: On Monday, the Nifty 50 and the Sensex marked their steepest single-day fall since 30 March, slumping 1.49% and 1.7%, respectively.

india_trends.title: Akasa Air to start Noida airport flights from June 16
india_trends.summary: Noida International Airport will welcome Akasa Air flights starting June 16. This marks the second airline to operate from the new airport. india_trends.title: India’s jobless rate rises to 5% in Q4
india_trends.summary: India's unemployment rate climbed to 5% in the January-March quarter. This rise was primarily due to an increase in joblessness among women. Overall urban unemployment saw a slight decrease, while rural unemployment edged up. Youth unemployment also experienced an upward trend during this period. La

india_trends.title: Airport operators to keep records of security hold area, tarmac photos for 3 years: DGCA
india_trends.summary: Airport operators now face a new directive from the DGCA. They must keep records of all photographs taken in security hold areas and on the tarmac. These records are to be preserved for a period of three years. The Directorate General of Civil Aviation can demand these records for inspection at any

india_trends.title: Zerodha's Nikhil Kamath suggests exploring gold-based stablecoins for India
india_trends.summary: Zerodha co-founder Nikhil Kamath questioned the long-term suitability of dollar-backed stablecoins for India and proposed exploring a gold-linked stablecoin. He said such a model could monetise idle household gold holdings while reducing dependence on dollar-dominated digital financial systems and s

india_trends.title: Industry must aim for a strategic reset amid global turmoil: Shaktikanta Das
india_trends.summary: Shaktikanta Das urged Indian companies to prioritize long-term resilience over short-term cost efficiency amid global volatility. He called for diversified supply chains, stronger balance sheets, workforce reskilling and continued reforms to help India remain globally competitive.

India’s booming Dubai gold trade may be built on someone else’s mines
india_trends.summary: Policymakers in India are increasingly worried about the surge in gold imports, especially following the beneficial India-UAE trade deal that has intensified gold inflows. india_trends.title: Sebi proposes allowing depositories to use part of IPF investment income for trust expenses
india_trends.summary: At present, stock exchanges are permitted to use a maximum of 5 per cent of the interest or income generated from IPF investments for meeting expenses related to dedicated employees of the IPF Trust, administration of Investor Service Centres, and other statutory and administrative expenses such as

india_trends.title: Alphabet considers first yen bond sale to fund AI goals
india_trends.summary: The person was not ​authorized to speak on the matter and declined to be identified. Alphabet did not immediately respond to ​a Reuters request on the offering size.

india_trends.title: BofA settles allegation of insider trading rule violation with Sebi
india_trends.summary: In its settlement order, the SEBI stated that a show-cause notice ​sent to BofA Securities India alleged the firm's failure to maintain ​the structured digital database required by insider trading regulations. BofA declined to comment on the settlement order ​and the allegations.

india_trends.title: Sunil Bharti Mittal says now is the time to ‘double down’ on investing in India: 'Cut obsession with gold imports'
india_trends.summary: Amid soaring global crude oil prices and an energy crisis fuelled by the ongoing US-Iran conflict, Sunil Bharti Mittal, also advocated the use of renewable energy.

india_trends.title: Indian Hotels Q4 Results: Net profit rises 15% YoY to ₹600 crore; announces dividend of ₹3.25 per share
india_trends.summary: Indian Hotels Company reported a Q4FY26 net profit of ₹600 crore, a 15% YoY increase. Revenue rose 14% to ₹2,845 crore, driven by strong hotel segment performance. The company anticipates opening 60 new hotels in FY27, with optimistic demand forecasts.
